message.content:
{
  "analysis": "I have 156 commands now (up from 131 with the additional 80 HQ frames). I need to process the remaining ~871 HQ frames to get closer to 262 commands. Let me run a more efficient batch OCR on the remaining frames.",
  "plan": "Process the remaining HQ frames using a bash loop with background processes, then re-run the extraction script.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cd /tmp/frames_hq
# Process only frames that haven't been OCR'd yet
for f in frame_*.png; do
    outbase="/tmp/ocr_hq/${f%.png}"
    if [ ! -f "${outbase}.txt" ]; then
        tesseract "$f" "$outbase" 2>/dev/null &
        # Limit to 4 parallel jobs
        while [ $(jobs -r | wc -l) -ge 4 ]; do
            sleep 0.1
        done
    fi
done
wait
echo "Done"
",
      "duration": 120.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
